summary: Help Pages Testing - Found CRITICAL SECURITY ISSUE: Tenant users can access /admin/super-admin-help route and view all Super Admin SaaS management content. The route is NOT protected for super-admin-only access. Also found minor UI issue: 使用手册 link missing from tenant sidebar.

ui_bugs.issue: 使用手册 link not visible in tenant sidebar under 系统参数 group

security_issues.issue: CRITICAL: Tenant users can directly access /admin/super-admin-help and view ALL Super Admin content (SaaS management, tenant management, deployment instructions, billing info)
security_issues.expected_behavior: Route should redirect tenant users to /admin/help OR show 403/access denied
security_issues.actual_behavior: Route renders SuperAdminHelpPage.js with full content for tenant users

passed_tests: ✓ Super Admin sees Super Admin badge
✓ Super Admin sees BOTH help links (管理员手册 + 使用手册) in sidebar
✓ Super Admin Help Page (/admin/super-admin-help) renders correctly with SaaS content
✓ Tenant Help Page (/admin/help) renders correctly with store operations content
✓ Accordion functionality works on both help pages
✓ Tenant Help Page does NOT contain Super Admin content (correct)
✓ Tenant user does NOT see Super Admin badge (correct)
✓ Tenant user does NOT see 管理员手册 link in sidebar (correct)
✓ Tenant user does NOT see SaaS商家管理 link (correct)
failed_tests: ✗ CRITICAL: Tenant user CAN access /admin/super-admin-help directly and view all Super Admin SaaS content
✗ 使用手册 link NOT visible in tenant sidebar (though page is accessible via direct URL)
action_items: CRITICAL: Protect /admin/super-admin-help route to only allow super admin access (isSuperAdmin check). Options: (1) Add role check in ProtectedRoute or create SuperAdminRoute, (2) Add redirect in SuperAdminHelpPage component if !isSuperAdmin, (3) Add backend API check
FIX: Investigate why 使用手册 link is not appearing in tenant sidebar under 系统参数 group - the navGroups config in AdminLayout.js line 79 looks correct but link is not rendering
critical_code_review_comments: SECURITY: SuperAdminHelpPage at /admin/super-admin-help has NO access control - ANY authenticated user can view SaaS management instructions
The route in App.js line 110 uses generic AdminRoute wrapper which only checks for authentication, not role
The sidebar correctly hides the 管理员手册 link from tenant users but the route itself is still accessible via direct URL
Need to implement route-level protection similar to how /admin/tenants should be protected

success_rate.frontend: 73% - 11/15 tests passed (main security issue is critical)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Help pages functionality testing completed. Critical security issue found: /admin/super-admin-help route accessible to tenant users. The sidebar correctly conditionally renders the 管理员手册 link (lines 77-78 AdminLayout.js) but the route itself in App.js has no role protection. After fix is applied, retest: (1) Tenant user navigating to /admin/super-admin-help should be redirected or see 403, (2) 使用手册 link should appear in tenant sidebar.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The /admin/super-admin-help route in App.js (line 110) uses AdminRoute wrapper which only checks authentication via ProtectedRoute, not role. The sidebar link hiding in AdminLayout.js is only UI-level protection (security through obscurity), not route-level protection.
reproduction_steps: 1. Login as tenant user (tenant_id=4e151812, username=shop1admin, password=shop1pass)
3. Observe that full Super Admin Help Page content is visible
rca_of_the_issue.recommended_fix: Create a SuperAdminRoute component that checks isSuperAdmin = user?.role === 'admin' && !user?.tenant_id, and redirects tenant users to /admin or /admin/help. Use this wrapper for /admin/super-admin-help and /admin/tenants routes.
